name: 機能の要望/Feature request

---

**その機能が欲しい理由(任意)/Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.(optional)**
なるべく簡潔に/A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**機能の概要(必須)/Describe the solution you'd like(required)**
なるべく簡潔に/A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**こうすればいいんじゃない的なアレ(任意)/Describe alternatives you've considered(optional)**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**備考(任意)Additional context(optional)**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
